rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type scopes when bounds are concrete and visible.
Use assign statements in implementation scopes only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables.
Write AGREE contracts inside annex agree {** ... **}; blocks.
generic_rules: Use eq declarations for boolean range checks with visible variables.
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions.
Avoid encoding AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless model exposes typed ports or constants.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax uses assume/guarantee labels with colons and semicolons.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations.
Implementation annexes are for assignments and bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope.
Do not reference AADL property names as AGREE variables without explicit model exposure.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
